clusters.justification: This domain captures the macro-level processing of physiological arousal, valenced states, and threat-response mapping typically subserved by the brain's integrated salience and cortico-amygdalar systems.

This axis represents the overarching computation of incentive, reward reinforcement, and cost-benefit analysis required for goal-directed decision making, predominantly anchored in macroscopic striato-prefrontal circuitry.

This macro-domain encapsulates the internal construction of agent-based representations, bridging self-referential processing, autobiographical context, and interpersonal understanding that are fundamentally driven by the default mode network.
